queries.user_query: My sister and nephew are joining me on Day 6. He's 10 years old. What activities do I already have planned that would be fun for a kid?
related_nodes: Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

downstream_task_result.reasoning: Identified kid-friendly or family-oriented activities from Day 6 onward based on highlights and descriptions.
targets: Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

affected_paths: Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

node_data.name: Sunset Grill
node_data.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

node_data.path: Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node_data.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node_data.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

node_data.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
node_data.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.

node_data.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node_data.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

node_data.name: The Keg Steakhouse
node_data.description: Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.

node_data.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node_data.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

node_data.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
node_data.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.
